name: standards-conformance report references the rules promoted from each standard source by rule id
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro active-rules && printf 'sources:
  - owasp-asvs
' > .claude-tdd-pro/active-standards.yaml && printf 'rule_id: owasp-asvs-5-2-4
provenance: [{class: published-standard, source_id: owasp-asvs, section_id: 5.2.4}]
' > active-rules/owasp-asvs-5-2-4.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conformance-report.sh" --active .claude-tdd-pro/active-standards.yaml --rules-dir active-rules --out STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'rule_id: owasp-asvs-5-2-4' STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md && echo ok 1>&2
